name: obsidian-markvault
description: Powerful annotation plugin for Obsidian: highlights, bold, underline with notes, tags, relations, graph view, and W3C annotation support.

scripts.deploy: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && node scripts/deploy.mjs
scripts.test: npx tsx tests/annotation-store.test.ts && npx tsx tests/block-fingerprint.test.ts && npx tsx tests/block-annotation.test.ts && npx tsx tests/block-format-g1.test.ts && npx tsx tests/debug-block-ranges.test.ts && npx tsx tests/boundary-conditions.test.ts && npx tsx tests/native-annotation.test.ts && npx tsx tests/region-annotation.test.ts && npx tsx tests/inline-target-hash.test.ts && npx tests/markdown-plain.test.ts && npx tsx tests/context-menu.test.ts && npx tsx tests/ui-logic.test.ts && npx tsx tests/metadata-extension.test.ts && npx tsx tests/search.test.ts && npx tsx tests/graph-data-builder.test.ts && npx tsx tests/w3c-serializer.test.ts && npx tsx tests/w3c-import.test.ts && npx tsx tests/s2-data-safety.test.ts && npx tsx tests/pdf-annotation.test.ts && npx tsx tests/mindflow-basic.test.ts
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Jiang
